content.en:
Outside the inheritance of the Qilin Palace.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was anxiously waiting, although Ye Tian had not been in for a long time, it was too long compared to the time he had predicted.

According to his estimates, Ye Tian had already come out early, why didn't he come out now?

Wow!

The void rippled, and a figure appeared, it was Ye Tian.

"Wanfa Supreme, you have finally come out!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu breathed a sigh of relief.

Ye Tiandao: "I have gained a lot this time, I need to sort out the harvest first, and then distribute the harvest!"

"Good!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said excitedly.

The more Ye Tian harvested, the more things he would naturally share.

However, the distribution method agreed between him and Ye Tian is more complicated, to put it simply, if the harvest is not much, the two will share it equally, if the harvest is large, only allocate him enough resources to break through to the god general level.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was secretly looking forward to it, while Ye Tian was sorting out the harvest.

Those top-level elixirs, chaos spirit treasures, charms and other treasures, you can probably know the value after a little look.

"Great Divine Power - Kirin's Wrath!"

"The Origin Thing—Qilin Flame!"

These two treasures were also precious, but after Ye Tian learned about it, he couldn't look down on it at all, because although the great divine power of Qilin Fury was much more powerful than these great divine powers in the universe, it was not qualified to be ranked as one of the three thousand great divine powers of Chaos.

"Trash!"

Ye Tian despised it, he still thought that Qilin Allah could give such good magical powers, at the beginning, even small forces such as the Tibetan God Organization could come up with such great magical powers as Hengguang Divine Powers, but Qilin Allah did not have such great magical powers.

However, he also roughly guessed the reason.

Allah's top divine power is too difficult to cultivate, and the top divine power ranked as one of the three thousand great divine powers, the conditions required are just harsh, but the matching origin is very precious.

Qilin Allah must have cast a net all over the chaos to drop the Qilin Hall, if each Qilin Hall put some precious origin things, it would be too expensive, and he would not be able to collect so many precious origin things.

And the Qilin Flame is related to the Qilin Allah from the name, and can even be cultivated, so the Qilin Allah can put a large amount of Qilin Fire.

Therefore, it is good to give the great magic power of Qilin's wrath.

Moreover, the Qilin Hall is just a channel for Qilin Allah to accept disciples, if you really receive good seedlings, naturally bring them back and cultivate them slowly, then the resources given are different, even if they are among the top 100 divine powers and the corresponding origin things, they are not impossible to give.

Comparatively speaking, the Tibetan God Organization is just sending in a constant light supernatural power inheritance, which can be continuously copied at almost no cost, so naturally it doesn't care.

"This great divine power should have been created by Allah Qilin, maybe there is something tricky, give it to the Lord of Yuangu!" Ye Tian decided.

The Qilin Hall still has three inheritances, one is the chaotic alchemy technique of refining the flesh - the true body of the Qilin, the other is the secret technique of transforming the bloodline, the Qilin blood technique, and the other inheritance is the method of compressing divine power - the Nine Overlapping Palace!

"The Qilin True Body and the Qilin Blood Technique are useless to me, I already have the Xuan Xuan Technique, which is much more powerful than the Qilin True Body, and the Qilin Blood Technique is to transform the bloodline, and it is impossible for me to transform the bloodline. As for the Nine Overlapping Palace, this inheritance is good, and it is of great use to me, but I just lack a method that can compress divine power. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It took a lot of time, and Ye Tian finally finished sorting it out.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, this time you have gained a lot, and it is enough for you to step into the god-level combat power. In addition, this time, I have obtained three top-notch inheritances and a great supernatural power and the corresponding origin thing. I'll give you two allocation options, one is to give you two top-notch inheritances, and the great supernatural power and the corresponding origin things are also given to you, but other resources have to be given to you less. If you want other resources, then you can only be given a top-notch inheritance, and that great divine power and the corresponding origin things can't be given to you!" Ye Tian said.

"What kind of inheritance, what kind of supernatural powers?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked urgently.

"One is the Chaos Alchemy Technique, which is called the Qilin True Body. Chaos Alchemy is a secret technique of refining the body in chaos, which can expand the limit of the physical body. It's a pity that you are not a rebel, although the Qilin True Body can also expand the limits of your physical body and allow you to continue to cultivate your physical body, its potential is limited. There is also a lineage that is the Qilin Blood Technique, which can transform your bloodline and make your bloodline strong. These two lineages should hopefully advance you to the rank of Divine General. In addition, I also obtained a drop of Qilin True Blood, which can also be given to you, which is enough for you to break through in a short time. As for that great supernatural power, it is called the wrath of the unicorn, and the origin thing is called the unicorn flame, although this great supernatural power cannot be ranked as one of the three thousand great supernatural powers of chaos, but it is more powerful than the strongest great supernatural power in the universe. "

After Ye Tian finished speaking, the Lord of the Yuan Gu was completely moved.

The two top inheritances and that great divine power that Ye Tian gave him were too powerful, if he got it, his strength would be enough to step into the god general level. As for other resources, where can they be compared to the inheritance.

If he has resources, he will still be able to get them in the future, but if he loses his inheritance, he will not be able to make any progress.

His goal is not just to step into a one-star god general, so resources are not important, inheritance is more important.

"I choose those two top inheritances and that great supernatural power, as for other resources, I can ask for less!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"Good!"

Ye Tian immediately handed over the two top inheritances, the Qilin Fury Great Divine Power, the Qilin Flame, and the Qilin True Blood to the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and gave him a few charms, a Chaos Spirit Treasure, and a small amount of elixir.

Compared to Ye Tian's harvest, the harvest of the Lord of the Yuan Gu was too little and too little.

But the Lord of the Yuan Gu has obtained a few inheritances, and it is worth it, at least he has nothing to give.

"Thank you Wanfa Supreme!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu is truly grateful.

After all, he didn't pay anything, just led the way, and he gained so much, which can be called the biggest opportunity in his life.

"After all, everyone is the supreme of a universe, and your strength is stronger, which is naturally beneficial to our universe. Plus, you'll need to take me to the source!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu answered.

The source place is also a mysterious and powerful inheritance place, although the number of resources is small, but each resource is very precious, if Ye Tian goes, he should gain more than him, and even get more treasures.

"Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, you don't have to give me the harvest of the source, these treasures are enough for me to impact the god general level. In addition, once you enter the source area, it may take a long time. "

The Lord of the Yuan Gu reminded.

"I understand!, if I enter the source land, the human race will also ask the Lord of the Yuan Gu to take care of it a little, and I will be attacked by the powerhouse of the Cangyu Universe!" Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu promised.
